sections.text: This Act may be cited as the Gwembe District Special Fund (Dissolution) Act.
In this Act, unless the context otherwise requires— " the Fund " means the Gwembe Rural Council Fund; " the Order " means the Zambia (Gwembe District) Orders, 1959 and 1964. [App. 9]
There is hereby established a Fund which shall be known as the Gwembe Rural Council Fund.

On the commencement of this Act all moneys and other assets on that date in or standing to the credit of the Gwembe District Special Fund established under section 9 of the Order , Appendix 5 of the 1965 Edition of the Laws, shall vest in the Minister and thereupon the Gwembe District Special Fund shall stand dissolved.
